name: 15 ML Pyrantel Pamoate And Febantel Suspension
about: This 15 ML Pyrantel Pamoate And Febantel Suspension is a liquid veterinary treatment specially designed for dogs. It contains chemicals that help in treating and preventing various parasitic infections in dogs. The suspension comes in a liquid form, making it easy to administer to your furry friends. It is recommended to store the suspension in a dry place to maintain its efficacy. With the combination of pyrantel pamoate and febantel, this suspension works effectively against hookworms, roundworms, and whipworms. The suspension is safe and can be given to puppies over two weeks old and adult dogs.

faq.q: How should I administer the Pyrantel Pamoate And Febantel Suspension to my dog?
faq.a: The suspension can be administered orally, either directly into the mouth or mixed with their food.

faq.q: Is it safe to use Pyrantel Pamoate And Febantel Suspension on puppies?
faq.a: Yes, it is safe to use on puppies over two weeks old.

faq.q: How often should I give the suspension to my dog?
faq.a: It is recommended to give the suspension once every month or as directed by your veterinarian.

faq.q: Can this suspension cause any side effects in dogs?
faq.a: Some dogs may experience mild side effects like vomiting and diarrhea. However, these side effects are temporary and should subside on their own.

faq.q: How should I store the Pyrantel Pamoate And Febantel Suspension?
faq.a: The suspension should be stored in a dry place away from direct sunlight and heat.
